title: Arbys Simulator
description:
all our food

KEEPS BLOWING U-
body:
It's more fun if you don't know

Do _not_ add to your modpacks, this mod is not fun for more than 10 minutes and will break other mods

If you find bugs, good for you! I will most likely not be patching this at all.

requires fabric api

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Items in your inventory will become increasingly unstable, randomly blowing up!
The chance to blow up will increase over time

</details>
